summary: Fixed dashboard board with three improvements: (1) completed features now show a compact summary view (cycle time, task count, task list) instead of a wall of green Done Kanban columns; (2) the token section now shows 'All Projects · Last 7 Days' label with a note explaining pew tracks by tool not per project; (3) when no feature is active and none is explicitly selected, the board shows a recent activity feed aggregated from task lastTransition timestamps across all features, with a 'Recent Activity' dropdown option to reset to this view.
